name: with-agents
description: Operate external Agent CLIs through a deterministic tmux controller

interface.shortDescription: Run and message external Agent CLIs in persistent panes.
interface.longDescription: Launch exact external Agent CLI commands, exchange atomic messages, and manage persistent tmux-backed pane lifecycles without replacing native subagents.
defaultPrompt: Launch Codex in a persistent pane and send it this task.
Use Pi to work on this task and keep its pane available.
Inspect this existing Agent pane and continue the conversation.
